name: IT Help Investigation Agent Network
description: Triages IT support tickets, escalates critical issues, and resolves common problems through cross-platform investigation with Help Center and License Procurement agents.

tokenUrl.description: OAuth2 token endpoint for the License Procurement agent (client credentials grant)

clientId.description: OAuth2 client ID the broker presents to the License Procurement agent

clientSecret.description: OAuth2 client secret -- inject at deploy time via --property, never commit a default value

apiKey.description: API key for the Escalation MCP server -- inject at deploy time, never commit a default value

url.description: Jira MCP Server URL (called on-behalf-of the inbound user)

tokenUrl.description: OAuth2 token endpoint Jira accepts for the OBO token exchange

clientId.description: OAuth2 client ID the broker uses to perform the OBO exchange with Jira

clientSecret.description: OAuth2 client secret for the Jira OBO exchange -- inject at deploy time, never commit a default value

apiKey.description: OpenAI API key -- inject at deploy time, never commit a default value
